title: Sign in success navigates to dashboard
description: Verifies a user can sign in with valid credentials and reaches the dashboard tab.

steps.description: Verify the user lands on the dashboard

title: Sign in validation error when email is blank
description: Verifies submitting the sign-in form with an empty email shows a validation error.

steps.description: Verify a validation error is visible for the email field

title: Sign in validation error when password is blank
description: Verifies submitting the sign-in form with an empty password shows a validation error.

steps.description: Verify a validation error is visible for the password field

title: Sign in validation error when both fields are blank
description: Verifies submitting the sign-in form with both fields empty shows validation errors.

steps.description: Verify validation errors are visible for the email and password fields

title: Sign in shows error on invalid credentials
description: Verifies entering an incorrect password shows an invalid-credentials error and does not log the user in.

steps.description: Fill invalid-password-123 into the password field
Verify an invalid credentials error is visible

title: Sign in form remains available after invalid credentials
description: Verifies the sign-in UI remains usable after an invalid-credentials attempt.

steps.description: Fill invalid-password-123 into the password field
Wait for the sign-in request to complete
Verify the sign-in form is still displayed

title: Dashboard loads with core summary content
description: Verifies the dashboard primary content (greeting, stats, low-stock alerts, shopping list preview) is displayed after login.

steps.description: Click the tab to open the dashboard
Verify a greeting with the signed-in user context is displayed
Verify dashboard summary sections for inventory, spending, low-stock alerts, and shopping list preview are displayed

title: Dashboard shopping list preview item can be marked complete
description: Marks one shopping list item complete from the dashboard preview and verifies the preview updates.

steps.description: Click the tab to open the dashboard
Tap a shopping list item in the dashboard preview to toggle its completion state
Verify the toggled shopping list item shows as completed in the dashboard preview

title: Dashboard full shopping list modal updates preview after completing multiple items
description: Opens the full shopping list from the dashboard, completes multiple items, and verifies the dashboard preview reflects the changes.

steps.description: Click the tab to open the dashboard
Open the full shopping list from the dashboard preview
Mark one shopping list item as complete in the full list
Mark a second shopping list item as complete in the full list
Close the full shopping list modal
Verify the dashboard shopping list preview reflects the updated completion states

title: Dashboard low-stock alerts section is viewable
description: Verifies low-stock inventory alerts are shown on the dashboard when available, otherwise shows an empty state.

steps.description: Click the tab to open the dashboard
Scroll to the low-stock alerts section
Verify low-stock alerts are displayed or an empty state is displayed for low-stock alerts

title: Dashboard spending summary section is displayed
description: Verifies the monthly/weekly spending summary content is present on the dashboard.

steps.description: Click the tab to open the dashboard
Scroll to the spending summary section
Verify spending summary data is displayed or an empty state is displayed for spending summary

title: Inventory list loads and supports adding a new item end-to-end
description: Filters inventory, adds a new item via the add item form, and verifies it appears in the inventory list.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Verify the inventory list is visible by scrolling through the list
Filter items by a category option
Fill Test Item Alpha into the item name field
Fill a valid stock level into the stock level field
Fill a valid threshold into the threshold field
Verify Test Item Alpha is displayed in the inventory list

title: Inventory item stock can be updated
description: Selects an inventory item, updates its stock level, and verifies the updated stock is reflected in the list.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Fill Stock Update Item into the item name field
Fill a valid stock level into the stock level field
Fill a valid threshold into the threshold field
Select the inventory item named Stock Update Item
Fill a different valid stock level into the stock update field
Verify the inventory list shows updated stock information for Stock Update Item

title: Add item form validates required fields
description: Attempts to submit the add item form with missing required fields and verifies validation feedback is shown.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Submit the add item form without filling required fields
Verify validation errors are displayed for missing required fields

title: Inventory item can be deleted after confirmation
description: Creates an item, deletes it using the delete interaction with confirmation, and verifies it is removed from the list.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Fill Delete Me Item into the item name field
Fill a valid stock level into the stock level field
Fill a valid threshold into the threshold field
Initiate delete for the inventory item named Delete Me Item using the supported delete gesture
Verify Delete Me Item is not displayed in the inventory list

title: Inventory category filter can be cleared to show all items
description: Applies a category filter and then clears it to return to the full inventory list.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Filter items by a category option
Clear the category filter to show all items
Verify the inventory list returns to an unfiltered view

title: AI camera scanning modal can be opened from inventory and closed
description: Opens the camera inventory modal from inventory and verifies the scanning UI is presented, then closes it.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Verify the camera inventory scanning interface is displayed
Verify the user returns to the inventory list

title: AI camera scanning flow: add selected identified items to inventory
description: Runs the AI analysis from a picked image, selects identified items, adds them to inventory, and verifies new items appear.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Pick a photo from the device gallery for analysis
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Toggle at least one identified item to select it
Add the selected identified items to inventory
Verify at least one newly added item from the analysis is displayed in the inventory list

title: AI camera scanning flow handles no or low-confidence results with retry or manual add option
description: After AI analysis yields no/low-confidence results, verifies the UI provides a failure message and a way to retry or add manually.

steps.description: Click the tab to open inventory
Pick a photo from the device gallery for analysis
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Verify an analysis failure or no-results state is displayed with an option to retry or add items manually

title: Manual spending entry can be added and appears in the monthly list with updated total
description: Verifies a user can add a spending entry manually and then see it in the list and reflected in the monthly total.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Store A into the store name field
Verify a spending entry for Store A with amount 12.34 is displayed in the current month list
Verify the total monthly spend is updated

title: Spending list and monthly total load for the current month
description: Verifies the spending screen loads and shows the current month spending list and a monthly total.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify the list of spending entries for the current month is displayed
Verify the total monthly spend is displayed

title: Navigate between months in spending history
description: Verifies a user can navigate to a different month and the spending view updates to that month.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Navigate to the previous month in the month selector
Verify the spending entries list is showing the selected month
Verify the total monthly spend reflects the selected month

title: Delete a spending entry via swipe and confirm it is removed
description: Verifies a user can delete a spending entry and it no longer appears in the list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Fill Delete Me Store into the store name field
Swipe to delete the spending entry for Delete Me Store
Verify the spending entry for Delete Me Store is no longer displayed in the list
Verify the total monthly spend is updated

title: Manual add spending validates required fields
description: Verifies the manual add spending form prevents submission when required fields are missing.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Verify a validation error is visible for the missing required fields
Verify no new spending entry is added to the list

title: Receipt scan flow creates a spending entry after confirming extracted data
description: Verifies receipt scanning can create a spending entry after reviewing extracted store name and total.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Pick a receipt image from the gallery
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Confirm to add the spending entry using the extracted data
Verify a new spending entry is displayed in the current month list
Verify the total monthly spend is updated

title: Receipt scan extraction failure shows error and allows switching to manual entry
description: Verifies that when AI extraction fails, the UI shows an extraction error and allows manual entry as an alternative path.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Pick a receipt image from the gallery
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Verify an extraction error state is displayed with an option to enter details manually
Choose the option to enter details manually
Verify the manual spending entry form is displayed

title: Receipt scan modal opens and shows review UI after analysis
description: Verifies the receipt scan modal can be opened and progresses to the review step after analysis completes.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Pick a receipt image from the gallery
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Verify a review step is displayed with extracted store details and a total amount
Verify there is an option to confirm adding the spending entry

title: Confirming receipt scan adds a spending entry to the spending list
description: Verifies the end-to-end receipt OCR flow results in a new spending entry visible in the spending list.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Pick a receipt image from the gallery
Wait for AI analysis to complete
Confirm to add the spending entry using the extracted data
Verify the spending entry created from the receipt is displayed in the list
Verify the total monthly spend is updated

title: Offline cached data can be viewed when returning to the dashboard after prior load
description: Verifies that after loading data once, navigating back to the dashboard later still displays previously loaded data from cache.

steps.description: Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Wait for the dashboard content to load
Verify dashboard data sections are displayed using previously loaded data
Verify the dashboard does not require re-authentication to display cached content

title: Register for push notifications when permission is granted
description: Verifies that granting notification permission from the dashboard results in an in-app confirmation that notifications are registered.

steps.description: Wait for the system notification permission prompt to appear
Grant notification permission on the system prompt
Verify a confirmation state is shown indicating notifications are enabled or registered

title: Handle denied push notification permission with guidance
description: Verifies that denying notification permission results in an in-app disabled state with instructions to enable notifications later.

steps.description: Wait for the system notification permission prompt to appear
Deny notification permission on the system prompt
Verify an in-app state is shown indicating notifications are disabled
Verify guidance is displayed for enabling notifications later in device settings

title: Dashboard loads after sign-in and does not block on notification prompt dismissal
description: Verifies the primary dashboard content is accessible even if the notification prompt is dismissed without choosing allow/deny.

steps.description: Wait for the system notification permission prompt to appear
Dismiss the system notification permission prompt
Verify the dashboard primary content is displayed

title: Notification permission prompt is not repeatedly shown after a permission decision in the same session
description: Verifies the app does not re-prompt for notification permission after the user has already made a permission choice during the current session.

steps.description: Wait for the system notification permission prompt to appear
Deny notification permission on the system prompt
Verify the system notification permission prompt is not shown again

title: Notification registration UI state persists across tab navigation after granting permission
description: Verifies that once notifications are enabled, navigating away and back keeps the enabled/registered state visible on the dashboard.

steps.description: Wait for the system notification permission prompt to appear
Grant notification permission on the system prompt
Verify a confirmation state is shown indicating notifications are enabled or registered
